specific_mechanism: BROUWER-REASON: compact convex region + continuous iterator + existence + enumerate
llm_application: Restrict reasoning to a compact convex region; ensure the per-step iterator is continuous; apply existence theorem to guarantee fixed-point reasoning state exists; enumerate fixed points via boundary-perturbation.
novelty_claim: R684 (Picard) and R698 (Banach) require contraction. R700 Brouwer = existence only, allows multiple fixed points.
